title: Alphabet Q2 Earnings: Four key things investors should watch
description: Alphabet is set to report its second-quarter FY2026 earnings this week. Investors are closely watching whether the company's heavy investments in artificial intelligence are translating into stronger financial performance. title: Asian shares mostly gain, as South Korea's Kospi jumps 4.7%
description: Asian shares have mostly gained, with markets in South Korea and Japan trading higher after recent declines due to heavy selling of stocks linked to artificial intelligence.
content:
HONG KONG (AP) — Asian shares mostly gained on Tuesday, with markets in South Korea and Japan trading higher after recent declines due to heavy selling of stocks linked to artificial intelligence.
U.S. futures edged higher, while oil prices slipped.

title: China's new AI model halts new subscriptions as demand swamps capacity
description: The new, powerful Chinese artificial intelligence model Kimi K3, which has caused a stir in the US tech industry, has suspended new subscriptions after a flood in demand overwhelmed capacity within days of the launch.

title: AI-guided technique improves targeted therapy delivery for brain tumors

title: Who is Indian-origin MP Kanishka Narayan? UK's first AI minister appointed by new Prime Minister Andy Burnham
description: UK Prime Minister Andy Burnham has appointed Kanishka Narayan as minister for artificial intelligence, making the role cabinet-level for the first time. Here's all you need to know about him.
content:
